title: Training Config
description: Example schema for a model training configuration.

project.title: Project
project.description: Experiment or workspace name used in generated run metadata.

backend.title: Backend
backend.description: Select the execution target for generated commands.

training.title: Training
training.description: Core training controls with schema-backed validation and UI hints.

batch_size.title: Batch size
batch_size.description: Samples per optimizer step before gradient accumulation.

learning_rate.title: Learning rate
learning_rate.description: Optimizer step size. Log-scale controls make small values editable.

x-ui.note: Learning rates are shown on a logarithmic slider so 1e-5 and 1e-3 are both easy to reach.

mixed_precision.title: Mixed precision
mixed_precision.description: Use lower precision arithmetic where supported.
